title: Indulgent Icelandic-Impressed Norwegian Light Fish Kebabs
description: Gooey, savory skewers of light Norwegian fish, infused with sage, wok-hei, and a hint of Icelandic flair, served hot in a kadhai vessel.

ingredients.name: Sage Leaves
ingredients.notes: Fresh, with stems intact for skewering.

instructions: Thread Norweigan cod fillets, sage leaves, and lemon wedges onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the kadhai vessel with ghee and heat over medium-high heat.
In a small bowl, mix together grain mustard, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sesame oil to the bowl and whisk until well combined.
Add the fish skewers to the hot kadhai vessel and brush with the mustard-spice mixture on both sides.
Cook for 4-6 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through and the sage leaves are caramelized.
Serve hot in the kadhai vessel, garnished with chopped fresh parsley and a side of Icelandic rye bread, if desired.
